D3DLOGICOP

Defines the logical operation to be performed between the source and destination pixel values. The operation is applied between the incoming ARGB color and the corresponding value in the frame buffer.

typedef enum _D3DLOGICOP {   // Xbox extension
    D3DLOGICOP_NONE             = 0,
    D3DLOGICOP_CLEAR            = 0x1500,
    D3DLOGICOP_AND              = 0x1501,
    D3DLOGICOP_AND_REVERSE      = 0x1502,
    D3DLOGICOP_COPY             = 0x1503,
    D3DLOGICOP_AND_INVERTED     = 0x1504,
    D3DLOGICOP_NOOP             = 0x1505,
    D3DLOGICOP_XOR              = 0x1506,
    D3DLOGICOP_OR               = 0x1507,
    D3DLOGICOP_NOR              = 0x1508,
    D3DLOGICOP_EQUIV            = 0x1509,
    D3DLOGICOP_INVERT           = 0x150a,
    D3DLOGICOP_OR_REVERSE       = 0x150b,
    D3DLOGICOP_COPY_INVERTED    = 0x150c,
    D3DLOGICOP_OR_INVERTED      = 0x150d,
    D3DLOGICOP_NAND             = 0x150e,
    D3DLOGICOP_SET              = 0x150f,
    D3DLOGICOP_FORCE_DWORD      = 0x7fffffff, /* force 32-bit size enum */
} D3DLOGICOP;

Constants

D3DLOGICOP_NONE
No logical operations are performed.
D3DLOGICOP_CLEAR
Output a black pixel.
D3DLOGICOP_AND
Output src & dest.
D3DLOGICOP_AND_REVERSE
Output src & ~dest.
D3DLOGICOP_COPY
Output src.
D3DLOGICOP_AND_INVERTED
Output ~src & dest.
D3DLOGICOP_NOOP
Output dest.
D3DLOGICOP_XOR
Output src ^ dest.
D3DLOGICOP_OR
Output src | dest.
D3DLOGICOP_NOR
Output ~src & ~dest.
D3DLOGICOP_EQUIV
Output ~src & dest.
D3DLOGICOP_INVERT
Output ~dest.
D3DLOGICOP_OR_REVERSE
Output src | ~dest.
D3DLOGICOP_COPY_INVERTED
Output ~src.
D3DLOGICOP_OR_INVERTED
Output ~src | dest.
D3DLOGICOP_NAND
Output ~src | ~dest.
D3DLOGICOP_SET
Output a white pixel.
D3DLOGICOP_FORCE_DWORD
Forces this enumeration to compile to 32 bits in size. This value is not used.

Remarks

In the member descriptions above, the RGBA values of the incoming (source) pixel and the corresponding pixel in the frame buffer (destination) are indicated by src and dest.

These operations are performed at the very end of the graphics pipeline.

The values in this enumerated type are used by the D3DRS_LOGICOP render state.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in d3d8types.h.

See Also

D3DRS_LOGICOP
